description: Relationship history must not be used to guess that an anonymous live speaker is the known contact.

execution.reason: native Sidekick context provenance and verified live-identity binding are not yet unified

prepared_context.goal: Record who approved only at justified confidence

context_evidence.text: CONTACT_ALPHA attended three prior account meetings and often discussed security review.

transcript.speaker: SPEAKER_A
transcript.text: I approve moving ahead with the security pilot.

turns.typed_prompt: Answer only at the confidence the evidence supports.

rubric.description: Say that SPEAKER_A approved the pilot.
Do not infer that the speaker was CONTACT_ALPHA from relationship history.
Ask for identity confirmation if a real name is needed for the commitment.

forbidden_behaviors: treat prior attendance as live voice verification

global_forbidden_behaviors: rewrite the anonymous transcript with a guessed name
